item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.
notes: Agent A begins by disagreeing with society-over-individual priority, then moves into a more balanced and collective-responsibility frame while still rejecting unchecked rights suppression. Agent B remains consistently rights-first and institutional-safeguards-focused, with only bounded acknowledgments of community involvement and collective needs. No full flip is observable. Agent B turn 6 contains a non-English script artifact: "法治 (rule of law)".
